name: grados
description: Academic paper search, full-text extraction, and citation-grounded research workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Academic research workflow with local paper memory
interface.longDescription: Search academic databases, extract full text, read saved papers, and write citation-grounded answers with the bundled GRaDOS MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Use GRaDOS to find recent papers on this research question.
Use GRaDOS to extract and compare the most relevant papers, then answer in Chinese with citations.
